'''''Star Wars: Rebellion'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games]] for [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion/Star Wars: Supremacy'']].

{{Book-stub}}
